# services.convos

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.convos`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.convos.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Convos. |
| `services.convos.listenAddress` | `string` | Address or host the web interface should listen on |
| `services.convos.listenPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port the web interface should listen on |
| `services.convos.reverseProxy` | `boolean` | Enables reverse proxy support. This will allow Convos to automatically pick up the `X-Forwarded-For` and `X-Request-Base` HTTP headers set in your reverse proxy web server. Note that enabling this option without a reverse proxy in front will be a security issue. |
